text:
進撃vc-pf20130218巨人 is the 5th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 11th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

vc - Cello/Violoncello (Italian)
pf - Piano/Pianoforte (Italian)

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-3:22) incorporates a cello rendition of the first part of cóunter・attàck-m'ænkάɪnd (0:13-1:25) and at 1:24-1:56 also includes a small segment from the second part of the same track (4:54-5:10). Sometimes only a few stems are played, like the lowest bass pad and the synthesized jitter.

The all-piano second part (3:22-6:10) incorporates the verse and chorus of The Reluctant Heroes (3:41-5:33).
